---
title: "Process_Raw_Reads"
output: html_document
author: "Ozge S. Kuddar"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# Process from nochim to count data, RA data, for family, genus, species levels with different RA tresholds

```{R}

library(arrow)
library(dada2)

set.seed(2025)

its2_samples <- read_feather("/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/DNAPool_ALL_its2_concat_dada2_nochim.feather")
trnl_samples <- read_feather("/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/DNAPool_ALL_trnl_merged_dada2_nochim.feather")

its2_samples <- as.data.frame(its2_samples)
trnl_samples <- as.data.frame(trnl_samples)
colnames(trnl_samples)[colnames(trnl_samples) == "X"] <- "Sample"
colnames(its2_samples)[colnames(its2_samples) == "X"] <- "Sample"


###############################################################
trnl_taxa <- assignTaxonomy ((colnames(trnl_samples)[-1]), "/Users/PhD_Process/trnl_its2_DB_Paper/DBs_dada2_BRC/Obitools_trnl_CH_Final_NBC.fasta", multithread=TRUE)

its2_taxa <- assignTaxonomy ((colnames(its2_samples)[-1]), "/Users/PhD_Process/trnl_its2_DB_Paper/ITS2_DBs/Obitools/Obi_ITS2_Combined_Final_dada2_NBC.fasta", multithread=TRUE)

###############################################################
# Save trnl_taxa
trnl_taxa_save <- cbind(SeqID = rownames(trnl_taxa), trnl_taxa)
write_feather(as.data.frame(trnl_taxa_save),
              "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Processed_All_Reads/Base_files/trnl_ASV_taxa_withunclassified_Dec_2025.feather")

# Save its2_taxa
its2_taxa_save <- cbind(SeqID = rownames(its2_taxa), its2_taxa)
write_feather(as.data.frame(its2_taxa_save),
              "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Processed_All_Reads/Base_files/its2_ASV_taxa_withunclassified_Dec_2025.feather")
###############################################################

trnl_taxa2 <- trnl_taxa
its2_taxa2 <- its2_taxa


fill_taxonomy <- function(taxa_df) {
  
  rank_suffixes <- c(
    Kingdom = "_k",
    Phylum  = "_p",
    Class   = "_c",
    Order   = "_o",
    Family  = "_f",
    Genus   = "_g",
    Species = ""        # species inherits deepest suffix
  )
  
  rank_order <- names(rank_suffixes)
  n_ranks <- length(rank_order)
  
  filled_df <- taxa_df
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(taxa_df))) {
    
    row_vals <- taxa_df[i, ]
    
    # all NA → Unclassified
    if (all(is.na(row_vals))) {
      filled_df[i, ] <- "Unclassified"
      next
    }
    
    # deepest known level
    deepest_known_idx <- max(which(!is.na(row_vals)))
    deepest_known_value <- row_vals[[deepest_known_idx]]
    deepest_suffix <- rank_suffixes[deepest_known_idx]
    
    # fill all NA *to the right* with deepest_known_value + deepest_suffix
    for (j in seq_len(n_ranks)) {
      if (is.na(row_vals[[j]])) {
        filled_df[i, j] <- paste0(deepest_known_value, deepest_suffix)
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(filled_df)
}

trnl_taxa2 <- fill_taxonomy(trnl_taxa2)
its2_taxa2 <- fill_taxonomy(its2_taxa2)

any(is.na(trnl_taxa2))
any(is.na(its2_taxa2))

###############################################################
# Save trnl_taxa2
trnl_taxa2_save <- cbind(SeqID = rownames(trnl_taxa2), trnl_taxa2)
write_feather(as.data.frame(trnl_taxa2_save),
              "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Processed_All_Reads/Base_files/trnl_ASV_taxa_filled_Dec_2025.feather")

# Save its2_taxa2
its2_taxa2_save <- cbind(SeqID = rownames(its2_taxa2), its2_taxa2)
write_feather(as.data.frame(its2_taxa2_save),
              "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Processed_All_Reads/Base_files/its2_ASV_taxa_filled_Dec_2025.feather")
###############################################################
######################################################################

aggregate_taxa_levels <- function(abundance_matrix, taxa_table) {
  # Define the ranks to process
  RANKS <- c("Family", "Genus", "Species")
  
  # Ensure the abundance matrix has sample names as rownames
  # (This assumes the input abundance_matrix already has ASVs as columns and counts as values)
  
  # Get the ASV sequences (which are the column names of the abundance matrix)
  asv_sequences <- colnames(abundance_matrix)
  
  # Check if the ASV names in the abundance matrix match the rownames of the taxa table
  if (!all(asv_sequences %in% rownames(taxa_table))) {
    stop("Column names (ASVs) in abundance_matrix do not fully match rownames (ASVs) in taxa_table.")
  }
  
  # Use lapply to iterate over the defined ranks
  results_list <- lapply(RANKS, function(rank) {
    # 1. Get the taxonomic grouping vector
    # We select the taxa names for the ASVs present in the abundance matrix
    grouping_vector <- taxa_table[asv_sequences, rank]
    
    # 2. Perform aggregation using rowsum on the transposed abundance matrix
    # Note: t(abundance_matrix) makes ASVs rows. rowsum sums the counts for shared taxa (group).
    # t() transposes back to Samples x Taxa.
    # na.rm = TRUE handles any unexpected NAs that may have been missed during initial 'Unclassified' replacement
    
    # Check if the abundance matrix has more than one row (sample) before transposing
    # and setting row/col names for t() and rowsum() stability
    if (nrow(abundance_matrix) == 0) {
      warning(paste("Abundance matrix is empty for rank:", rank))
      return(NULL)
    }
    
    aggregated_matrix <- t(rowsum(
      t(abundance_matrix),
      group = grouping_vector,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ))
    
    # 3. Convert the result to a data frame
    return(as.data.frame(aggregated_matrix))
  })
  
  # Name the list elements for easy access
  names(results_list) <- RANKS
  
  return(results_list)
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Pre-processing of the data before calling the function
# (This setup block is necessary before the single function call)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------


# STEP 1: Prepare Abundance Matrices (ASVs as columns, Samples as rows/rownames)
# For trnl:
trnl_abund_matrix <- as.matrix(trnl_samples[, -1])
rownames(trnl_abund_matrix) <- trnl_samples[, 1]

# For its2:
its2_abund_matrix <- as.matrix(its2_samples[, -1])
rownames(its2_abund_matrix) <- its2_samples[, 1]

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# SINGLE FUNCTION CALLS TO GENERATE ALL 6 DATA FRAMES
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------

# Generate the three TRNL data frames
trnl_results <- aggregate_taxa_levels(trnl_abund_matrix, trnl_taxa2)

# Generate the three ITS2 data frames
its2_results <- aggregate_taxa_levels(its2_abund_matrix, its2_taxa2)

# Assign the 6 data frames to individual variables for convenience (as requested by previous output format)
trnl_family <- trnl_results$Family
trnl_genus  <- trnl_results$Genus
trnl_species <- trnl_results$Species

its2_family <- its2_results$Family
its2_genus  <- its2_results$Genus
its2_species <- its2_results$Species

####################################################################################
# Save no_RA_treshold files
library(arrow)

df_list <- list(
  trnl_family,
  trnl_genus,
  trnl_species,
  its2_family,
  its2_genus,
  its2_species
)

df_names <- c(
  "trnl_family_count_Dec2025",
  "trnl_genus_count_Dec2025",
  "trnl_species_count_Dec2025",
  "its2_family_count_Dec2025",
  "its2_genus_count_Dec2025",
  "its2_species_count_Dec2025"
)

for (i in seq_along(df_list)) {
  df_temp <- df_list[[i]]
  df_out  <- cbind(Sample = rownames(df_temp), df_temp)
  write_feather(as.data.frame(df_out),
                paste0("/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Processed_All_Reads/", df_names[i], ".feather"))
}

####################################################################################

# Convert to RA 

make_RA <- function(df_list) {
  lapply(df_list, function(df) {
    df2 <- df[ , colSums(df) > 0, drop = FALSE]
    df2 <- df2[rowSums(df2) > 0, , drop = FALSE]
    df2 / rowSums(df2)
  })
}

df_list <- list(
  trnl_family,
  trnl_genus,
  trnl_species,
  its2_family,
  its2_genus,
  its2_species
)

RA_list <- make_RA(df_list)

trnl_family_RA  <- RA_list[[1]]
trnl_genus_RA   <- RA_list[[2]]
trnl_species_RA <- RA_list[[3]]
its2_family_RA  <- RA_list[[4]]
its2_genus_RA   <- RA_list[[5]]
its2_species_RA <- RA_list[[6]]



####################################################################################


# Save different RA treshold files

library(arrow)

apply_thresholds <- function(df_list, df_names, thresholds) {
  
  invisible(
    lapply(thresholds, function(t) {
      lapply(seq_along(df_list), function(i) {
        
        df_temp <- df_list[[i]]
        df_temp[df_temp < t] <- 0
        
        df_temp <- df_temp[ , colSums(df_temp) > 0, drop = FALSE]
        df_temp <- df_temp[rowSums(df_temp) > 0, , drop = FALSE]
        
        df_out <- cbind(Sample = rownames(df_temp), df_temp)
        
        write_feather(
          as.data.frame(df_out),
          paste0("/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Processed_All_Reads/",
                 df_names[i], "_", t, "_Dec2025.feather")
        )
      })
    })
  )
}

df_list <- list(
  trnl_family_RA,
  trnl_genus_RA,
  trnl_species_RA,
  its2_family_RA,
  its2_genus_RA,
  its2_species_RA
)

df_names <- c(
  "trnl_family",
  "trnl_genus",
  "trnl_species",
  "its2_family",
  "its2_genus",
  "its2_species"
)

thresholds <- c(1e-8, 0.0004, 0.001, 0.01)

apply_thresholds(df_list, df_names, thresholds)




# Check prevalence and median RA for unclassified classified (_{X}) columns

library(arrow)

path <- "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Processed_All_Reads/"

files <- c(
  "trnl_species_1e-08_Dec2025.feather",
  "trnl_species_4e-04_Dec2025.feather",
  "trnl_species_0.001_Dec2025.feather",
  "trnl_species_0.01_Dec2025.feather"
)

files <- file.path(path, files)

suffixes <- c("_k","_p","_c","_o","_f","_g")

compute_stats <- function(df) {
  
  df <- df[grep("Sample", df$Sample), , drop = FALSE]
  
  out <- lapply(suffixes, function(suf) {
    
    cols <- grep(paste0(suf, "$"), colnames(df), value = TRUE)
    if (length(cols) == 0) return(c(mean = NA, prevalence_percent = NA))
    
    vals <- df[, cols, drop = FALSE]
    nonzero <- unlist(vals)
    nonzero <- nonzero[nonzero > 0]
    
    med <- if (length(nonzero) == 0) NA_real_ else mean(nonzero)
    prev <- round(mean(rowSums(vals > 0) > 0) * 100,2)   # percentage
    
    c(mean = med, prevalence_percent = prev)
  })
  
  out_vec <- unlist(out)
  names(out_vec) <- paste0(
    rep(suffixes, each = 2),
    c(".mean", ".prevalence_percent")
  )
  
  out_vec
}

result_table <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(files, function(f) {
    df <- as.data.frame(read_feather(f))
    stats <- compute_stats(df)
    cbind(File = basename(f), t(stats))
  })
)


```

# Generate Sample and Control Samples files 

```{R}
library(arrow)

base_path <- "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Processed_All_Reads"

# list ONLY files in this folder (no subfolders) that end with .feather
files <- list.files(
  base_path,
  pattern = "\\.feather$",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = FALSE
)

# extract clean names without "_Dec2025.feather"
clean_names <- sub("_Dec2025\\.feather$", "", basename(files))

# read all feather files into a named list
df_list <- lapply(files, function(f) as.data.frame(read_feather(f)))
names(df_list) <- clean_names

# Cleanup 
rows_to_remove <- c(
  "DNAPool1_A10","DNAPool1_A11","DNAPool1_A12",
  "DNAPool3_Sample-107","DNAPool3_Sample-118","DNAPool3_Sample-122"
)

df_list <- lapply(df_list, function(df) {
  
  df <- df[!df$Sample %in% rows_to_remove, ]
  
  df$Sample[df$Sample == "DNAPool3_E1"] <- "DNAPool3_Sample-107"
  df$Sample[df$Sample == "DNAPool3_G1"] <- "DNAPool3_Sample-118"
  df$Sample[df$Sample == "DNAPool3_H1"] <- "DNAPool3_Sample-122"
  
  df
})


# Create files only for Samples

out_path <- "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Sample_Reads/"

# iterate through df_list using names(df_list)
invisible(
  lapply(names(df_list), function(nm) {
    
    df <- df_list[[nm]]
    
    # keep only rows where Sample contains "Sample"
    df2 <- df[grep("Sample", df$Sample), , drop = FALSE]
    
    # remove zero-sum columns (but keep Sample column)
    numeric_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df2), "Sample")
    keep_numeric <- numeric_cols[colSums(df2[, numeric_cols, drop = FALSE]) > 0]
    df2 <- df2[, c("Sample", keep_numeric), drop = FALSE]
    
    # output file name
    out_file <- paste0(out_path, "Samples_", nm, ".feather")
    
    write_feather(as.data.frame(df2), out_file)
  })
)



# Create files only for Control Samples

out_path <- "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/Control_Sample_Reads/"

control_patterns <- c(
  "High_Pollen_Only",
  "High_Pollen_Soil",
  "Neg_Extr_Cntrl",
  "Pollen_Pool_Amp_Cntrl",
  "Low_Pollen_Only",
  "Low_Pollen_Soil",
  "Cntrl_96",
  "Cntrl_95",
  "Soil_Only",
  "Water_Cntrl",
  "Tissue_Pool_Amp_Cntrl"
)

pattern_regex <- paste(control_patterns, collapse = "|")

invisible(
  lapply(names(df_list), function(nm) {
    
    df <- df_list[[nm]]
    
    # keep only control samples
    df2 <- df[grep(pattern_regex, df$Sample), , drop = FALSE]
    
    # remove zero-sum numeric columns (keep Sample)
    numeric_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df2), "Sample")
    keep_numeric <- numeric_cols[colSums(df2[, numeric_cols, drop = FALSE]) > 0]
    df2 <- df2[, c("Sample", keep_numeric), drop = FALSE]
    
    # output filename
    out_file <- paste0(out_path, "Control_Samples_", nm, ".feather")
    
    write_feather(as.data.frame(df2), out_file)
  })
)


```


# ITS2 and trnL combination

```{R}
library(arrow)

set.seed(1881)
low_count_value <- 1e-6

trnl_cross_contam <- c("Sample8", "Sample13")
low_rc <- c("Sample3", "Sample30", "Sample56", "Sample58",
            "Sample160", "Sample175", "Sample186", "Sample193")

filter_zero_rows_cols <- function(df_input) {
  df_step1 <- df_input[, colSums(df_input) > 0, drop = FALSE]
  df_step2 <- df_step1[rowSums(df_step1) > 0, , drop = FALSE]
  df_step2
}

levels_vec <- c("family", "genus", "species")
thresholds <- c("4e-04", "1e-08", "0.001", "0.01")

for (lv in levels_vec) {
  for (th in thresholds) {
    
    its2_path <- paste0(
      "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/",
      "Sample_Reads/Samples_its2_", lv, "_", th, ".feather"
    )
    trnl_path <- paste0(
      "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/",
      "Sample_Reads/Samples_trnl_", lv, "_", th, ".feather"
    )
    
    its2_RA <- as.data.frame(read_feather(its2_path))
    trnl_RA <- as.data.frame(read_feather(trnl_path))
    
    rownames(its2_RA) <- its2_RA$Sample
    rownames(trnl_RA) <- trnl_RA$Sample
    its2_RA$Sample <- NULL
    trnl_RA$Sample <- NULL
    
    its2_RA[is.na(its2_RA)] <- 0
    trnl_RA[is.na(trnl_RA)] <- 0
    
    rownames(its2_RA) <- gsub("DNAPool[1-6]_", "", rownames(its2_RA))
    rownames(trnl_RA) <- gsub("DNAPool[1-6]_", "", rownames(trnl_RA))
    rownames(its2_RA) <- gsub("-", "", rownames(its2_RA))
    rownames(trnl_RA) <- gsub("-", "", rownames(trnl_RA))
    rownames(its2_RA) <- gsub("_", "", rownames(its2_RA))
    rownames(trnl_RA) <- gsub("_", "", rownames(trnl_RA))
    
    trnl_RA <- trnl_RA[!rownames(trnl_RA) %in% c(trnl_cross_contam, low_rc), , drop = FALSE]
    its2_RA <- its2_RA[!rownames(its2_RA) %in% low_rc, , drop = FALSE]
    
    its2_RA <- filter_zero_rows_cols(its2_RA)
    trnl_RA <- filter_zero_rows_cols(trnl_RA)
    
    all_samples <- union(rownames(trnl_RA), rownames(its2_RA))
    all_taxa    <- union(colnames(trnl_RA), colnames(its2_RA))
    
    trnl_full <- matrix(0, nrow = length(all_samples), ncol = length(all_taxa),
                        dimnames = list(all_samples, all_taxa))
    its2_full <- matrix(0, nrow = length(all_samples), ncol = length(all_taxa),
                        dimnames = list(all_samples, all_taxa))
    
    trnl_full[rownames(trnl_RA), colnames(trnl_RA)] <- as.matrix(trnl_RA)
    its2_full[rownames(its2_RA), colnames(its2_RA)] <- as.matrix(its2_RA)
    
    trnl_its2 <- trnl_full + its2_full
    trnl_its2 <- filter_zero_rows_cols(trnl_its2)
    
    trnl_its2 <- trnl_its2 / rowSums(trnl_its2)

    trnl_its2 <- as.data.frame(trnl_its2)
    trnl_its2 <- cbind(Sample = rownames(trnl_its2), trnl_its2)
    
    out_path <- paste0(
      "/Users/PhD_Process/The_Last_Process/The_Last_Writing/GitHub/Process_Raw_Reads/",
      "Sample_Reads/Samples_trnl_its2_", lv, "_", th, ".feather"
    )
    
    write_feather(trnl_its2, out_path)
  }
}

```
